content:
# Recommendations for next plan iter (post iter-006)

## Closest-to-completion / now un-gated — PRIORITIZE
- **`H_tensor` (1.1.3)** and **`H_tensor_invertible` (1.1.2)** — `tensorBaseChangeFunctor`
  is now a real def, so `homTensorFunctor = tensorBaseChangeFunctor f F ⋙ coyoneda(I)`
  is concrete and its `map` unfolds (`tensorLeft`'s `map` = sheafify of `tensorHom`).
  The functor iso / right-exactness manipulations their proofs need are now derivable
  in principle. These are the genuine P1b-ii prove targets. Start with whichever has
  the simpler twist (1.1.3 `H_tensor` likely first — pure base-change naturality;
  1.1.2 adds an invertibility/Nakayama step on top).

## Coverage debt (Step 6 — planner must blueprint)
- **`MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.tensorLeft`** (`Basic.lean`) — NEW unmatched node.
  "Tensor by `F`" endofunctor on `X.Modules`, `N ↦ F ⊗_{𝒪_X} N`. Lean proof depends on:
  `tensorMod` (obj), `PresheafOfModules.Monoidal.tensorObj`/`tensorHom`(`_app`),
  `PresheafOfModules.sheafification`, `id_app`/`comp_app`,
  `MonoidalCategory.id_tensorHom_id`/`id_tensor_comp`, `Functor.map_id`/`map_comp`.
  Natural fold: it is the middle stage of `def:tensorBaseChangeFunctor`
  (`pullback f ⋙ tensorLeft F`) — add a `\lean{...tensorLeft}` sub-node or extend
  `def:tensorBaseChangeFunctor`'s `\uses{def:tensorMod}`.
- **`MR0555258CompactifyingPicard.instNonemptyModules`** — still unmatched (needed by
  opaque `relExt`, P1b-iii). Persisting debt; trivial blueprint stub or accept until
  `relExt` is realized. (`instNonemptyModulesFunctor` was removed this iter — debt
  dropped from 2-functor-instance to this single one + tensorLeft.)

## Blocked — do NOT re-assign (no structural change yet)
- **`H_locallyFree_of_ext_vanishing`** (concludes opaque `IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn`),
  **`ext_finite_flat` 2nd conjunct** (opaque `IsLFPAndFlatOn`),
  **`exists_acyclic_surjection`** (opaque `extGroup`): opaque-conclusion ⇒ no inhabiting
  term but sorry/axiom. Wait on P1b-iii. **Next def target = `IsLocallyFreeOfFiniteRankOn`**
  (gates 1.3, whose other input `H_represents` is already proven).
- **`exists_free_resolution_step` (1.4)**: conclusion is real (no opaque dep) but needs
  fp-sheaf ⇒ free-presentation SES + pullback-of-SES; `External.descent_noetherian`
  is too weak (descends base S only). Needs real infra — not a clean prove. Defer
  behind the free-presentation track.
- **8 deepest §1 nodes** (`basechange_q0`, `adjunction`, `nakayama_iso`, `ext_limit`,
  `ext_basechange_algebra`, `ext_adjunction`, `extBaseChangeMap`, `exchange`): fibre
  products / projective limits / base-change comparison map, all absent from Mathlib.

## Reusable proof patterns discovered (added to KB)
- **Hand-built "tensor by a fixed object" functor on `X.Modules`:** functor literal with
  `map = sheafify ∘ tensorHom`; close `map_id`/`map_comp` via
  `exact (congrArg G.map h).trans (G.map_id _ / G.map_comp _ _)` — defeq-tolerant, avoids
  the `SheafOfModules.id_val`/`comp_val` syntactic mismatch with the `X.Modules` instance.
- **Do NOT compose `forget ⋙ … ⋙ sheafification`** to get functor laws for free — the
  `⋙` boundary breaks `IsLocallyInjective` TC synthesis. Apply `sheafification.map`
  directly inside the literal.
- **Lemma names:** `MonoidalCategory.id_tensorHom_id` / `id_tensor_comp` (NOT `tensor_id`/
  `tensor_comp`, which don't exist); discharge with `exact`, not `rw`.

## Standing user-facing item (not a loop blocker)
- 6 `External.*` axioms re-flagged by doctor every iter (intentional boundary). User can
  silence by marking them protected in `archon-protected.yaml` (user-only file). TO_USER
  already carries this. No agent can do it.
